title: the data layer for Hyperliquid
summary_title: 80+ teams use Hydromancer's data layer. What they're building on HyperLiquid.
summary_description: Infrastructure powering app builders, market makers, and HIP4 prediction markets—plus research showing 29% of HyperLiquid traders are profitable.

key_moments.label: Xeno introduces Hydromancer: from HyperDash to infra
HyperDash acquired by pvp.trade; pivot to data layer
80+ teams using Hydromancer: app builders, market makers, HIP3/4
HIP4 prediction markets: binary options, politics, sports
Prediction: HIP4 launches early June, starting with binary options
Reservoir: free historical HyperLiquid data for everyone
Research: 29% of HyperLiquid traders are profitable
Eastern European scalping terminals hit 80% user profitability

pull_quote: Hyperliquid uniquely cultivated a community of people who actually wants to trade, because Binance and Coinbase didn't manage to get any traction on their prediction market products.
